meta.title: ALCARIS Arquitetura
meta.description: ALCARIS Arquitetura — A studio dedicated to commercial and residential projects that unite aesthetics, functionality, and identity. Led by Alan Carlos in Toledo, Paraná, Brazil.

hero.tagline: Transforming visions into spaces that tell stories

about.label: About us
about.title: Architecture with purpose and history
paragraphs: ALCARIS Arquitetura is a studio dedicated to creating commercial and residential projects that unite aesthetics, functionality, and identity.

Led by Alan Carlos, an architect graduated from Universidade Paranaense, the firm carries the trajectory of a professional recognized for innovation since the beginning of his career. At 21, Alan won a public competition for the Entrance Portal project of the city of Toledo-PR and also became the face of advertising campaigns for the Architecture course, appearing on billboards and television commercials throughout Paraná.

At 22, he already had projects in various regions of the state and, in 2024, at 23, became the youngest architect to be awarded by the Metropolitan Nucleus (Cascavel branch). Today, this experience translates into ALCARIS: a studio committed to transforming visions into spaces that tell stories.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we do
services.intro: Complete architecture and design solutions, from the first sketch to final delivery.

residential.title: Residential Architecture
residential.description: Homes that balance functionality, comfort, and a unique visual identity for every family.

commercial.title: Commercial Architecture
commercial.description: Corporate and commercial spaces designed to strengthen brand, flow, and user experience.

interiors.title: Interior Design
interiors.description: Complete environments with curated materials, furniture, and lighting in perfect harmony.

consulting.title: Consulting & Supervision
consulting.description: Technical guidance and supervision at every stage, from concept to final delivery.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Selected projects
portfolio.intro: A selection of works that represent our approach — each one tells a unique story of form, material, and light.

projects.project1: Black Fit Studio + Sunset Institute of Martial Arts

quote.text: Architecture is the balance between dream and reality, between form and function.

briefing.title: Listening & Briefing
briefing.description: We understand your needs, lifestyle, and vision to translate them into clear project guidelines.

concept.title: Concept & Study
concept.description: We develop creative proposals with floor plans, volumetry, and visual references for validation.

executive.title: Executive Project
executive.description: Complete technical detailing — structural, installations, finishes, and material specifications.

delivery.title: Construction & Delivery
delivery.description: Rigorous supervision of execution through final delivery, ensuring fidelity to the project.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's build something extraordinary together
contact.text: Reach out via WhatsApp and tell us about your project. We are ready to transform your vision into architecture.
